parts.part_description: Ghost part: groups the frame children for editing convenience. Depth-transparent — its children are bubbled up into WP-ROOT's level at explosion time and never appear as a build level on the manufacturing BOM.

bom_items.note: Standard wheels. Active only when option 301 (17 inch) is selected — the explicit standard option, per rule explicit-options-for-all-variants.
Upgrade wheels. Active only when option 302 (19 inch) is selected.
Alternate 1 of 2 in alt_group 'spindle'. Lowest priority wins among the alternates whose usage_subclauses evaluate true.
Alternate 2 of 2 in alt_group 'spindle' — covers both HSK-63F options (411 ohne Encoder, 412 mit Encoder). Unique priority within the alt_group is mandatory.

Numbered-option scaling: 3 brackets per panel (option 119 = 'Panel count', is_numbered, number_unit pcs). usage_subclauses decide WHETHER the line is active, option_scalings decide HOW MUCH. quantity=1 is the API minimum (Pydantic gt=0) and is the additive baseline — 24 panels give 1 + 72 brackets.
Ghost edge to the phantom assembly FRM-KIT (bom_structure=ghost, part_cost forced to 0 server-side). Its children are emitted at WP-ROOT's level; the kit itself is never built.

Stair-stepped range scaling on the same numbered option 119: ≤10 panels → 2 rails, 11–30 → 4, 31+ → 6. Range mode is ABSOLUTE on the explosion path (the quantity=1 base does not multiply); on the additive snapshot path the bracket value is added to the base. Empty usage_subclauses = always include — the ghost parent already gates it.

notes: Option ids are the synthetic acme universe: group 42 Wheels (301 = 17 inch, 302 = 19 inch), group 55 Frässpindel (410 = ISO 30 Standard, 411 = HSK-63F ohne Encoder, 412 = HSK-63F mit Encoder), group 60 Panels (119 = 'Panel count', is_numbered: true, number_min 1, number_max 48, number_step 1, number_unit 'pcs').
Area 7 is 'Widget Pro — Configuration'. WP-ROOT has an unconditional placement there; every variant decision lives on the bom_items below it.
PNL-BRK carries a 1-unit baseline because the API rejects quantity=0 (422). If the design needs a zero baseline, split it into two lines.
